actionCalls.name: myRule_7_A1
actionCalls.label: Sponsor stage and US Inside Sales role

rules.name: myRule_15
rules.label: New Sale + Upsell/Sponsor Verbal + US ENT Opp

rules.name: myRule_17
rules.label: New Sale + Upsell/Sponsor Verbal + US STRAT Opp

rules.name: myRule_19
rules.label: Sponsor Verbal Stage & US - Inside Sales

rules.name: myRule_23
rules.label: Market Intelligence Opp IS Closed Won

rules.name: myRule_30
rules.label: Stage Closed Lost & Reason Is Product

rules.name: myRule_59
rules.label: New Sale Closed Won - Add Owner to Account Team

rules.name: myRule_7
rules.label: Sponsor Verbal Stage & US - Inside Sales

rules.name: myRule_62
rules.label: Feature Update Closed Won - Add Owner to Account Team

rules.name: myRule_65
rules.label: Renewal Closed Won - Add Owner to Account Team

Flow.description: MIS-1875 fix Nodes 'Closed Lost - Renewal Reseller' & 'Closed Won - New sale Reseller'

value.stringValue:
"You have marked the Opportunity at 80% probability." &SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine,"-","")&SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine,"-","")&
"Please begin the handover process by following the below steps." &SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine,"-","")&SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine,"-","")&
"1. Make sure an account manager, solution implementation manager, and solution consultant are assigned to the account, by requesting from directors." &SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine,"-","")& "2. Schedule an internal handover with the account team." &SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine,"-","")& "3. Request named user list from the client." &SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine,"-","")& "4. Intro the client to their account team." &SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine,"-","")& "5. Schedule a kickoff call with the customer and account team to map out launch and user training." &SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine,"-","")& "Note: E-Mail templates can be found here: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1uuIs1Z46XBPenrhBngurJ6ScFdZN7_JBg_uIlfaGkwQ/edit"

formulas.name: formula_27_myRule_25_A1_4250848688
formulas.expression:
"You have marked the Opportunity at 80% probability." &SUBSTITUTE({!$Label.NewLine},"-","")&SUBSTITUTE({!$Label.NewLine},"-","")&
"Please begin the handover process by following the below steps." &SUBSTITUTE({!$Label.NewLine},"-","")&SUBSTITUTE({!$Label.NewLine},"-","")&
"1. Make sure an account manager, solution implementation manager, and solution consultant are assigned to the account, by requesting from directors." &SUBSTITUTE({!$Label.NewLine},"-","")& "2. Schedule an internal handover with the account team." &SUBSTITUTE({!$Label.NewLine},"-","")& "3. Request named user list from the client." &SUBSTITUTE({!$Label.NewLine},"-","")& "4. Intro the client to their account team." &SUBSTITUTE({!$Label.NewLine},"-","")& "5. Schedule a kickoff call with the customer and account team to map out launch and user training." &SUBSTITUTE({!$Label.NewLine},"-","")& "Note: E-Mail templates can be found here: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1uuIs1Z46XBPenrhBngurJ6ScFdZN7_JBg_uIlfaGkwQ/edit"

value.stringValue:
IF(
[Opportunity].Owner.Manager.Manager.Exclude_from_Email_Alerts__c || NOT([Opportunity].Owner.Manager.Manager.IsActive) , "" ,
IF( [Opportunity].Owner.Manager.UserRole.DeveloperName = 'Director_ANZ_Sales_and_CSM', [Opportunity].Owner.Manager.Email ,
IF(
OR( [Opportunity].Owner.Manager.UserRole.DeveloperName ='ENT_Resellers_Japan', [Opportunity].Owner.Manager.UserRole.DeveloperName ='ENT_Resellers_ROW' ), [Opportunity].Owner.Manager.Email ,
IF( OR( [Opportunity].Owner.Manager.Manager.Manager.UserRole.DeveloperName ='ENT_Resellers_Japan', [Opportunity].Owner.Manager.Manager.Manager.UserRole.DeveloperName ='ENT_Resellers_ROW' ), [Opportunity].Owner.Manager.Manager.Manager.Email, [Opportunity].Owner.Manager.Manager.Email ) ) ) )

formulas.name: formula_3_myRule_1_A1_9288910426

value.stringValue:
AND(
$Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps", $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps Extended",
OR( ISNEW() , ISCHANGED([Opportunity].StageName ) ) ,
OR( ISPICKVAL([Opportunity].Type , "New Sale"), ISPICKVAL([Opportunity].Type , "Renewal"), ISPICKVAL([Opportunity].Type , "Upsell") ),
[Opportunity].Account.Doubtful_Accounts__c = TRUE
)

formulas.name: formula_myRule_11
formulas.expression:
AND(
{!$Profile.Name} <> "SW SalesOps", {!$Profile.Name} <> "SW SalesOps Extended",
OR( ISNEW() , ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.StageName} ) ) ,
OR( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Type} , "New Sale"), ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Type} , "Renewal"), ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Type} , "Upsell") ),
{!myVariable_current.Account.Doubtful_Accounts__c} = TRUE
)

value.stringValue: AND( NOT(ISBLANK( [Opportunity].Owner.UserRoleId )), [Opportunity].Probability = 0.8, ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Type, 'New Sale' ), [Opportunity].Owner.IsActive = true, OR( Contains( [Opportunity].Owner.UserRole.DeveloperName, 'ENT_Sales_US_East'), Contains( [Opportunity].Owner.UserRole.DeveloperName, 'ENT_Sales_US_West'), Contains( [Opportunity].Owner.UserRole.DeveloperName, 'UK_ENT_Sales'), Contains( [Opportunity].Owner.UserRole.DeveloperName, 'UK_ENT_Sales_Nick_Thomas') ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_25
formulas.expression: AND( NOT(ISBLANK( {!myVariable_current.Owner.UserRoleId} )), {!myVariable_current.Probability} = 0.8, ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Type}, 'New Sale' ), {!myVariable_current.Owner.IsActive} = true, OR( Contains( {!myVariable_current.Owner.UserRole.DeveloperName}, 'ENT_Sales_US_East'), Contains( {!myVariable_current.Owner.UserRole.DeveloperName}, 'ENT_Sales_US_West'), Contains( {!myVariable_current.Owner.UserRole.DeveloperName}, 'UK_ENT_Sales'), Contains( {!myVariable_current.Owner.UserRole.DeveloperName}, 'UK_ENT_Sales_Nick_Thomas') ) )

value.stringValue: AND( NOT(ISBLANK( [Opportunity].Owner.UserRoleId )), [Opportunity].Probability = 0.8, ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Type, 'New Sale' ), [Opportunity].Owner.IsActive = true, OR( Contains( [Opportunity].Owner.UserRole.DeveloperName, 'ENT_Sales_US_East'), Contains( [Opportunity].Owner.UserRole.DeveloperName, 'ENT_Sales_US_West'), Contains( [Opportunity].Owner.UserRole.DeveloperName, 'UK_ENT_Sales'), Contains( [Opportunity].Owner.UserRole.DeveloperName, 'UK_ENT_Sales_Nick_Thomas') ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_25_pmetrule
formulas.expression: AND( NOT(ISBLANK( {!myVariable_old.Owner.UserRoleId} )), {!myVariable_old.Probability} = 0.8, ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_old.Type}, 'New Sale' ), {!myVariable_old.Owner.IsActive} = true, OR( Contains( {!myVariable_old.Owner.UserRole.DeveloperName}, 'ENT_Sales_US_East'), Contains( {!myVariable_old.Owner.UserRole.DeveloperName}, 'ENT_Sales_US_West'), Contains( {!myVariable_old.Owner.UserRole.DeveloperName}, 'UK_ENT_Sales'), Contains( {!myVariable_old.Owner.UserRole.DeveloperName}, 'UK_ENT_Sales_Nick_Thomas') ) )

value.stringValue:
AND( NOT( ISBLANK( [Opportunity].Owner.UserRoleId )), ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].StageName, 'Sponsor Verbal'), OR( ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Type,'New Sale' ), ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Type,'Upsell' ) ), OR(
CONTAINS([Opportunity].Owner.UserRole.DeveloperName,'UK'), CONTAINS([Opportunity].Owner.UserRole.DeveloperName,'France') ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_32
formulas.expression:
AND( NOT( ISBLANK( {!myVariable_current.Owner.UserRoleId} )), ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.StageName}, 'Sponsor Verbal'), OR( ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Type},'New Sale' ), ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Type},'Upsell' ) ), OR(
CONTAINS({!myVariable_current.Owner.UserRole.DeveloperName},'UK'), CONTAINS({!myVariable_current.Owner.UserRole.DeveloperName},'France') ) )

value.stringValue:
AND( NOT( ISBLANK( [Opportunity].Owner.UserRoleId )), ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].StageName, 'Sponsor Verbal'), OR( ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Type,'New Sale' ), ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Type,'Upsell' ) ), OR(
CONTAINS([Opportunity].Owner.UserRole.DeveloperName,'UK'), CONTAINS([Opportunity].Owner.UserRole.DeveloperName,'France') ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_32_pmetrule
formulas.expression:
AND( NOT( ISBLANK( {!myVariable_old.Owner.UserRoleId} )), ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_old.StageName}, 'Sponsor Verbal'), OR( ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_old.Type},'New Sale' ), ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_old.Type},'Upsell' ) ), OR(
CONTAINS({!myVariable_old.Owner.UserRole.DeveloperName},'UK'), CONTAINS({!myVariable_old.Owner.UserRole.DeveloperName},'France') ) )

value.stringValue: AND( ISPICKVAL([Opportunity].StageName,'Closed Lost'), OR( INCLUDES ([Opportunity].Closed_Lost_Reason__c,'Solution Gap - Data Accuracy Discrepancies'), INCLUDES ([Opportunity].Closed_Lost_Reason__c,'Solution Gap - Missing Coverage (country / platform)'), INCLUDES ([Opportunity].Closed_Lost_Reason__c,'Solution Gap - Missing Feature / Granularity'), INCLUDES ([Opportunity].Closed_Lost_Reason__c,'Solution Gap - Pricing and packaging unfit for use case'), INCLUDES ([Opportunity].Closed_Lost_Reason__c,'Solution Gap - Pricing of upsell offering was too high'), INCLUDES ([Opportunity].Closed_Lost_Reason__c,'Solution Gap - Product or features unfit for use case') ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_34
formulas.expression: AND( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.StageName},'Closed Lost'), OR( INCLUDES ({!myVariable_current.Closed_Lost_Reason__c},'Solution Gap - Data Accuracy Discrepancies'), INCLUDES ({!myVariable_current.Closed_Lost_Reason__c},'Solution Gap - Missing Coverage (country / platform)'), INCLUDES ({!myVariable_current.Closed_Lost_Reason__c},'Solution Gap - Missing Feature / Granularity'), INCLUDES ({!myVariable_current.Closed_Lost_Reason__c},'Solution Gap - Pricing and packaging unfit for use case'), INCLUDES ({!myVariable_current.Closed_Lost_Reason__c},'Solution Gap - Pricing of upsell offering was too high'), INCLUDES ({!myVariable_current.Closed_Lost_Reason__c},'Solution Gap - Product or features unfit for use case') ) )

value.stringValue: AND( ISPICKVAL([Opportunity].StageName,'Closed Lost'), OR( INCLUDES ([Opportunity].Closed_Lost_Reason__c,'Solution Gap - Data Accuracy Discrepancies'), INCLUDES ([Opportunity].Closed_Lost_Reason__c,'Solution Gap - Missing Coverage (country / platform)'), INCLUDES ([Opportunity].Closed_Lost_Reason__c,'Solution Gap - Missing Feature / Granularity'), INCLUDES ([Opportunity].Closed_Lost_Reason__c,'Solution Gap - Pricing and packaging unfit for use case'), INCLUDES ([Opportunity].Closed_Lost_Reason__c,'Solution Gap - Pricing of upsell offering was too high'), INCLUDES ([Opportunity].Closed_Lost_Reason__c,'Solution Gap - Product or features unfit for use case') ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_34_pmetrule
formulas.expression: AND( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.StageName},'Closed Lost'), OR( INCLUDES ({!myVariable_old.Closed_Lost_Reason__c},'Solution Gap - Data Accuracy Discrepancies'), INCLUDES ({!myVariable_old.Closed_Lost_Reason__c},'Solution Gap - Missing Coverage (country / platform)'), INCLUDES ({!myVariable_old.Closed_Lost_Reason__c},'Solution Gap - Missing Feature / Granularity'), INCLUDES ({!myVariable_old.Closed_Lost_Reason__c},'Solution Gap - Pricing and packaging unfit for use case'), INCLUDES ({!myVariable_old.Closed_Lost_Reason__c},'Solution Gap - Pricing of upsell offering was too high'), INCLUDES ({!myVariable_old.Closed_Lost_Reason__c},'Solution Gap - Product or features unfit for use case') ) )

value.stringValue:
AND(
OR( ISCHANGED([Opportunity].StageName), ISCHANGED([Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ) ),
ISPICKVAL([Opportunity].StageName, "Closed Won" ),
OR ( ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ,"Deal Size Approved"), ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ,"Rejected By Billing"), ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ,"New Amendment"), ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ,"Terms Approved"), ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ,"Contract Signed"), ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ,"Contract Signed Manually"), ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ,"Approved by Billing"), ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ,"Pending Legal or Billing Request"), ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ,"Pending rep to adjust quote") ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_68
formulas.expression:
AND(
OR( ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.StageName}), ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ) ),
ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.StageName}, "Closed Won" ),
OR ( ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ,"Deal Size Approved"), ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ,"Rejected By Billing"), ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ,"New Amendment"), ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ,"Terms Approved"), ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ,"Contract Signed"), ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ,"Contract Signed Manually"), ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ,"Approved by Billing"), ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ,"Pending Legal or Billing Request"), ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ,"Pending rep to adjust quote") ) )

value.stringValue:
AND( ISCHANGED([Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ), ISPICKVAL([Opportunity].StageName, 'Closed Won'),
OR ( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE( [Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ),'Deal Size Approved'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE( [Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ),'Rejected By Billing'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE( [Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ),'New Amendment'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE( [Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ),'Terms Approved'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE( [Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ),'Contract Signed'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE( [Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ),'Contract Signed Manually'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE( [Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ),"Approved by Billing"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE( [Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ),"Pending rep to adjust quote"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE( [Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ),"Contract Signed Manually") ),
AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ,'Deal Size Approved')), NOT(ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ,'Rejected By Billing')), NOT(ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ,'New Amendment')), NOT(ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ,'Terms Approved')), NOT(ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ,'Contract Signed')), NOT(ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ,'Contract Signed Manually')), NOT(ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ,"Approved by Billing")), NOT(ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ,"Pending Legal or Billing Request")), NOT(ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Quote_Status__c ,"Pending rep to adjust quote")) )
)

formulas.name: formula_myRule_71
formulas.expression:
AND( ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ), ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.StageName}, 'Closed Won'),
OR ( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE( {!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ),'Deal Size Approved'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE( {!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ),'Rejected By Billing'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE( {!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ),'New Amendment'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE( {!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ),'Terms Approved'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE( {!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ),'Contract Signed'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE( {!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ),'Contract Signed Manually'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE( {!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ),"Approved by Billing"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE( {!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ),"Pending rep to adjust quote"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE( {!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ),"Contract Signed Manually") ),
AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ,'Deal Size Approved')), NOT(ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ,'Rejected By Billing')), NOT(ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ,'New Amendment')), NOT(ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ,'Terms Approved')), NOT(ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ,'Contract Signed')), NOT(ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ,'Contract Signed Manually')), NOT(ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ,"Approved by Billing")), NOT(ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ,"Pending Legal or Billing Request")), NOT(ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Quote_Status__c} ,"Pending rep to adjust quote")) )
)

value.stringValue: AND( ISPICKVAL([Opportunity].Type, "New Sale"), ISCHANGED([Opportunity].StageName ) , ISPICKVAL([Opportunity].StageName, "Sponsor Verbal"), [Opportunity].Account.Industry_Cluster__c = "Investors" )

Flow.label: Opportunity PB
